workLog.task: Issue #1877 AC-1: build the variance-control harness to quantify Anthropic API determinism at temperature=0 on long context
workLog.outcome: Added scripts/eval/variance-control.py: runs N reps of one (fixture, agent) at temperature=0, computes verdict distribution, pass-rate variance, and normalized-Levenshtein response-text variance, and classifies the result against the issue's three branches. Reuses _scoring_engine._VERDICT_RE and AnthropicAPIAdapter; pure metrics are independently tested. AC-2 to AC-4 (live F002 run, committed report, ADR-058 note) require API spend and are left as the maintainer's deliberate step.
workLog.evidence: uv run pytest -> 30 passed; ruff clean; dry-run plan prints with no API calls

workLog.task: Issue #1877 AC-2/3/4: run the live control and write up the finding (user authorized API spend)
workLog.outcome: Ran the live N=20 control of (F002, security) at temperature=0 on claude-sonnet-4-6, ~7.4K input tokens/call, run 20260531T184905Z-60538bcf. Committed REPORT.md, summary.json, raw.jsonl, and FINDINGS.md (the ADR-058 follow-on note). Finding: text varies, verdict stable (ESCALATE x20, zero verdict variance; 20/20 unique responses, mean consecutive edit distance 0.64). Recommendation: gate AC-10 on verdict variance, not any-assertion pass-rate variance; the ADR amendment is left for architect ratification via adr-review.
workLog.evidence: 20/20 successful API calls, 0 errors; summary.json verdict_variance.stable=true; FINDINGS.md lints clean

nextSteps: Flip PR #2162 to Fixes #1877 (all four ACs complete)
Architect ratifies the AC-10 amendment (gate on verdict variance) via adr-review, per ADR-058's ratification rule
